title: Bitdeer Q2 2024 Financial Results
text: Bitdeer Technologies Group reported Q2 2024 financial results. Total revenue was US$99.2 million, compared to US$93.8 million in Q2 2023, showing revenue growth of 5.8%. Gross profit was US$24.4 million, compared to US$16.2 million in Q2 2023, representing gross profit growth of 50.6%. Net loss was US$17.7 million, compared to US$40.4 million in Q2 2023, representing a significant improvement. Adjusted EBITDA was US$24.9 million, compared to US$18.7 million in Q2 2023, showing adjusted EBITDA growth of 33.2%. These results were achieved despite significant growth in the global network hashrate and the April 2024 halving. Cash and cash equivalents were US$203.9 million as of June 30, 2024. The company's Q2 2024 results demonstrated solid revenue and profitability improvements year-over-year, with notably reduced losses compared to the prior year period.
